heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyPlease read the following carefully. Understanding these contents is very important for you to exercise your          personal rights and protect your personal information. Please be sure to use the products or services of the          Readoo platform ( hereinafter referred to as "Readoo" or " this platform ") Take the time to read this policy          carefully , and on the basis of fully understanding the following clauses , choose to accept or not.

Private information refers to secrets that citizens do not want to disclose or be known for others in their          personal lives. The Readoo platform attaches great importance to the protection of user privacy information.          When you use the products and services of this platform, this platform may collect and use your relevant          information. This platform hopes to explain to you through this policy(1) Your personal information that we may collect;

(2) This platform may obtain the permission of your terminal device;(3) Third-party SDK permissions;(4) How do we use cookies and similar technologies;(5) Purpose and rules of use of collected information;(6) Location and duration of information storage information;(7) Information sharing, transfer and disclosure;(8) How do we protect your personal information;(9) Your management of personal information;(10) How do we handle children's personal information;(11) Disclaimer of this platform;

(12) The scope of application of this policy;(13) The revision and effective date of this policy;(14) How to contact us ;Before you use this platform for all products and services, carefully read the policy and understand our process          to determine the rules of your personal information. If you have any questions about this privacy agreement,          you can contact the platform for consultation through the official feedback channel announced by the platform.

If you do not agree with any terms in this privacy agreement, you should stop using the products and services          of the platform immediately. Once you agree and accept all the contents of this policy (including the updated          version ) , it means that you choose to use or update this privacy policy on this platform ( this platform          will prompt you to update the situation ) to continue to use the products and services of this platform , and
agree to the platform to collect, use, save and share your relevant information in accordance with this          policy.

Information that may be collectedThis platform collects information to provide better services to all users. The main sources of information          collected by this platform are: the information you provide to this platform, the information obtained by this          platform during your use of the products and services of this platform, and your information shared by third          parties. The types of information collected by this platform mainly include the following specific types of

information collected1. Login: The user is authorized to log in to Google, Facebook, Apple account, avatar, nickname;2. Edit information: account picture, nickname, gender;3. My account: access and exchange records, etc .;4. Reading : The cumulative reading time of the user, reading books added to the bookshelf , reading books               or chapters, viewing the browsing history and reading history of the books;

5 , reading preferences : the user to read books read like form or selected preferences submitted by               adjusting the functional classification , selection of this form - Recommended books recommended in;6. Comments: Book reviews and topics published by users;7. Collection: books collected by users;8. Opinion feedback: account number, email address, error phenomenon and log submitted during feedback;
The permissions corresponding to the above functions are required for business functions. If the user does not          grant the corresponding permission, the related functions cannot be used.

( 1 ) Personal sensitive informationPersonal sensitive information refers to personal information that, once leaked, illegally provided or misused,          may endanger the safety of persons and property, easily lead to damage to personal reputation, physical and          mental health, or discriminatory treatment. The contents of "Personal Information" or "Personal Sensitive          Information" in this Privacy Policy are from GB / T35273-2017 "Personal Information Security Specification" ,

and the definition is consistent with the definition in "Personal Information Security Specification". Users          who log in Readoo using a third-party account to use the service, will be automatically collected by the third          party account has been expressly authorized personal information. In addition, users are required to provide          relevant personal information when submitting applications when using some functions or services of the Readoo
platform (including after-sales service and customer support).

( 3 ) Third-party SDK permissionsOur products and services may include third-party products and services, as well as links to third-party          websites. When you use these products or services, your information may also be collected. When providing          products and services to you by a third party, you may obtain the following permissions1. Third-party SDK permissions for the Android platform(1) Obtain your network rights for the purpose of allowing applications to obtain network links;

(2) Allow the application to access information about the network, such as the current network connection               is valid, the user equipment is distinguished 2G, 3G or a WiFi ;(3) Allow applications to access information about Wi-Fi networks, such as obtaining the mac address of               user devices;(4) Allow read-only access to phone status;(5) Write memory device permission, read memory device permission;(6) Allow applications to request installation packages.

(7) Android 8.0 install apk requires permission from unknown source(8) Allow applications to obtain battery-related information;2. Third-party SDK permissions for the ios platform:(1) Obtain your network rights for the purpose of allowing applications to obtain network links(2) Obtain user information for the purpose of logging in with a third-party account (including google,               facebook , Apple account )

( 4 ) CookiesTo ensure the normal operation of this platform, we will store small data files called cookies on your mobile          device. Cookies usually contain identifiers, site names, and some numbers and characters. With the help of          cookies, we can store your preferences and usage habits. We will not use cookies for any purpose other than          those described in this policy. You can manage or delete cookies according to your preferences.

Information sharing, transfer and disclosureInformation sharing1.This platform will not share your personal information with any company, organization or individual outside          this platform, except for the following:(1) Obtain your explicit consent or authorization in advance;(2) Provided in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, legal process requirements, mandatory               administrative or judicial requirements, when necessary;

(3) To the extent permitted by laws and regulations , it is necessary to provide protection of the               interests, property or safety of this platform or partners, you or other users of this platform or the               public, from damage ;(4) Only share your information, in order to implement the platform of the core functions of a product or               service or provide the services you need ;(5) Deal with your disputes or disputes with others according to your needs;

(6) Comply with relevant agreements signed with you               Including electronic agreements signed online and provided by corresponding platform rules or other legal               documents;(7) Used based on academic research;(8) It is used based on social and public interests in compliance with laws and regulations.2. This platform may share your personal information with related parties of this platform. However, the

platform will only need to share personal information, and be bound by this Privacy Policy. If the related          parties of this platform want to change the purpose of processing personal information, they will seek your          authorization and consent again.3. This platform may share your information to third-party partners, to provide security services for your          successful completion. However, this platform will only share your personal information for legal, legitimate,

necessary, specific and clear purposes, and will only share the personal information necessary to provide          services. The partners of this platform have no right to use the shared personal information for any other          purpose.4. For companies, organizations and individuals with whom this platform shares personal information, this          platform will require compliance with the confidentiality agreement and require them to process personal

information in accordance with the platform's instructions, this privacy policy and any other related          confidentiality and security measures.5. In order to comply with the law, enforce or apply the conditions of use and other agreements of the platform,          or to protect the rights and property or security of the platform, you or other customers of the platform,          such as to prevent fraudulent illegal activities and reduce credit risk, and Exchange information with other

companies and organizations. However, this does not include personal information sold, rented, shared, or          otherwise disclosed for profit-making purposes in violation of the commitments made in this privacy          policy.

Transfer of informationThis platform will not transfer your personal information to any company, organization and individual, except          for the following cases(1) Obtain your explicit consent or authorization in advance(2) Provided in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, legal process requirements, mandatory               administrative or judicial requirements when necessary(3) Provided in accordance with relevant agreements signed with you (including electronic agreements signed

online and corresponding platform rules) or other legal documents(4) When involving mergers, acquisitions, asset transfers or similar transactions, if personal information               transfer is involved, the platform will require new companies and organizations holding your personal               information to continue to be bound by this privacy policy, otherwise, the platform will require the               company and organization to ask you for authorization again

Disclosure of informationOnly under the following circumstances and under taking safety precautions industry-standard premise, the          platform will publicly disclose your personal information(1) You agree or authorize the disclosure of this platform(2) You use the sharing function(3) In cases where your personal information must be provided in accordance with the requirements of laws,               regulations, mandatory administrative enforcement or judicial requirements, the platform may publicly

disclose your personal information based on the type of personal information and the method of disclosure               required. In compliance with applicable law and regulations, when this platform received a request to               disclose the above information, this platform will be presented for the corresponding legal documents of               this platform for all requests were careful review, to ensure that they have the legal Basis, and limited

to data obtained by law enforcement agencies for specific investigation purposes and legal rights.(4) In an emergency, in order to protect the legal rights or public safety and interests of you, this               platform and other users;
